phase1.explanation:
🤖 **Testing ensures code quality and reliability.**

**Test types:**

| Type | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| Unit Tests | Test individual components |
| Integration Tests | Test component interaction |
| UI Tests | Test user interface |
| End-to-End | Test full flows |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Testing is essential for reliable apps."

**Testing tools:**

| Tool | Use |
|------|-----|
| JUnit | Test runner |
| MockK | Mocking |
| Coroutines Test | Coroutine testing |
| Truth | Assertions |

phase2.errorMessage:
1. No setup → duplication
2. No error testing → bugs
3. No mocks → slow tests
4. No coroutine support → flaky
5. No cleanup → state leaks
6. No assertions → no verification
